---
name: Documentation
about: Write or update framework documentation with clear scope, acceptance criteria,
  and required examples.
title: "[Milestone][Docs] StoryName (A1) — Short Description"
labels: documentation
assignees: KevMP

---

## Summary
- <1–2 sentences. What doc are we creating/updating?>

## Goal
- <Why does this doc exist? Who is it for? What does it enable?>

## Target audience
- <e.g., “Framework users (game devs), future maintainers, contributors”>

## Docs location
- <Exact path(s): e.g., docs/actors.md or docs/runtime/actor-runtime.md>

## Scope
- <Bullets of what this doc MUST include (topics/sections)>

## Out of scope
- <Bullets of what this doc will NOT cover>

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Doc includes a clear “Concepts” section (what it is / isn’t).
- [ ] Doc includes a clear “API / Usage” section (how to use it).
- [ ] Doc includes “Contract / Guarantees” (invariants, failure modes).
- [ ] Doc includes at least one “End-to-end example”.
- [ ] Doc includes a “Common mistakes / Misuse” section.
- [ ] Doc uses consistent terminology with the charter.

## Examples required
- [ ] Example 1: <name + what it demonstrates>
- [ ] Example 2 (optional): <name + what it demonstrates>

## Review checklist
- [ ] Links to relevant issues/epics are included.
- [ ] Terms match code symbols (module + function names).
- [ ] No implementation details that may drift (focus on contract + usage).
- [ ] Includes “next links” to adjacent docs (if applicable).

## Dependencies / Prereqs
- <Links to the issues that must exist/land first. If none, write “None”.>

## Notes
- <Optional. Keep short.>
